compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: PHASE 1-2 DONE (committed 19d3985d). Built faithful E2E tier (tests/e2e/) driving REAL bpmn-io libs via Node harness (bpmn-moddle + bpmn-auto-layout, esbuild-bundled, self-skipping). Reproduced the Save rejection (RED) then FIXED the root cause in bpmn.py: '@' arm ids are illegal BPMN NCNames -> real parser drops the arms. Now emit '.'-separated ids + <rebar:Config _role> marker; reconstruct arms structurally (gateway flow + role marker), robust to bpmn-js id rewrites. 5 e2e + 2 new unit guards green; full workflow unit suite (217) green. NEXT: front-end UX — bpmn-auto-layout on open + bpmn-js-properties-panel for view/edit.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: PHASE 3-4 DONE + DOCS (commits 495dd7c8, fab2c3e0). FRONT-END: built vendored editor bundle (src/rebar/llm/workflow/editor_assets/ -> dist/editor.{js,css}, esbuild, fonts inlined): bpmn-auto-layout on open (fixes single-row/overlap/center-arrows — verified 9/9 distinct top-level positions via e2e), bpmn-js-properties-panel + custom Rebar provider (view/edit each step's kind + <rebar:Config> JSON), served LOCALLY by editor.py (dropped CDN). editor.py: thin shell + /assets serving (allow-listed, no traversal) + bundle-missing guard. PACKAGING: pyproject force-includes dist, excludes node_modules (wheel 1.3MB, node_modules=0, dist shipped — verified by building the wheel). DOCS: new docs/workflow-editor.md (developer/author audience; states clients need none of this), README (edit cmd + Node-is-developer-only), architecture.md (editor_assets vendored data). Server smoke: GET / + /assets/editor.{js,css} all 200, POST /save 200, saved IR re-validates. KNOWN: nested loop/map/branch render as COLLAPSED subprocesses (drill-down) — bpmn-auto-layout doesn't expand inline; standard BPMN, flagged for human review. PENDING: Joe's in-browser review (the 744b gate).

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: ROUND 2 — browser-verified fixes (commits a2be0572, 2c66b1c7, c4b4cb60, +docs). Joe's in-browser review found the editor non-functional; root-caused via a NEW Playwright tier (real headless Chromium): (1) properties panel crashed at render ('debounceFn is not a function' — KindEntry didn't pass the debounce service), killing selection + group expansion; FIXED. (2) single column / no arrows — bpmn-auto-layout stacks our event-free nested IR vertically with 0 edges; DROPPED it and rewrote _emit_di as a real layered layout (longest-path x, stacked y, docked edge waypoints, EXPANDED sub-processes sized to contain children). (3) edits didn't persist (the testaroo loss) — was a side-effect of the crash; now an in-panel config edit persists to the IR on Save (browser-verified). Added 'Action (uses/prompt)' panel field. NEW real-browser E2E tier (tests/e2e/test_editor_browser.py) asserts edges render, no overlaps, panel reacts, edit persists — self-skipping. All editor/e2e tests green. Docs corrected (layout is ours, sub-processes expanded inline). READY for Joe's re-review.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: ROUND 3 — semantic clarity (commit 3355c92b + docs). Addressed Joe's 'I can't see what the workflow DOES' feedback, all browser-verified: (1) start+end events (entry/exit visible); (2) branch gateway LABELLED with its when-condition + flows labelled 'then (true)'/'else (false)'; panel adds read-only Condition field; (3) agent prompt TEXT resolved server-side (reviewer/.rebar/prompts) + shown read-only in panel; (4) DATA-LOSS FIX: plain bpmn:task (palette default) now maps to scripted instead of being dropped — this is why 'testaroo' vanished (saved file == pre-save .bak both times); (5) config textarea gains a JSON format hint. Parallel fan-out (fetch->{commits,graph}) explained as standard BPMN parallel split. Unit + browser-E2E guards added; 230 tests green. The else-contains-then confusion is correct nesting (escalate_gate is a nested branch inside the else arm, with its own then) — now legible via labels.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Done: built the faithful bpmn-moddle E2E tier + the real-browser Playwright tier (tests/e2e); editor view/edit round-trip remediated and browser-verified. Remaining UX architecture moved to the upcoming remediation epic.". Session: 438cb0a5.

compiled_state.title: E2E-test the bpmn round-trip with the real bpmn-io libs + remediate editor view/edit UX
